prompt: A highly detailed futuristic anime-style illustration of a female android engineer in a narrow industrial maintenance room, standing behind a waist-high machine workbench and facing the viewer. She has a sleek short bob haircut with straight bangs, in dark brown, and wears subtle rectangular glasses. Her face is calm and focused. Her body is a glossy white-and-black biomechanical suit with realistic panel seams, exposed mechanical abdomen components, articulated gray robotic hands, and a small chest marking reading "RC19". The overall look is elegant, feminine, and mechanical rather than bulky. She is posed with both hands resting on a large rectangular control platform in front of her, a heavy metallic device with rounded black corner housings, a white top panel, four visible bolt posts, a central circular port, technical printed labels, and an orange front strip labeled MANIC. The scene is lit by a single overhead industrial lamp centered above her head, creating dramatic warm highlights on the polished armor and metal surfaces. The room is dense with black pipes and bundled cables running along the ceiling and walls, with metallic wall panels, a small warning plaque on the left wall, a maintenance notice sheet on the right wall, a compact control box, and a floor cable looping near the machine. On the right side, include 1 angled diagnostic monitor displaying a cyan holographic-style interface with a humanoid body diagram, status graphs, and a circular readout showing "98%". Next to it, include 1 small auxiliary console box with buttons and a small illuminated label reading LINK ONLINE. The mood is cybernetic maintenance, precision engineering, and quiet industrial sci-fi realism. Use a centered full-body-to-knees composition, slightly low eye level, crisp linework, glossy reflections, intricate hard-surface detailing, realistic metal textures, cinematic contrast, warm overhead light against cool screen glow, and a polished high-end concept art finish.
